title: STEC BAA Amendment: Call for Proposals for Studies for On
text:
STEC BAA Amendment: Call for Proposals for Studies for On-demand Space Vehicle De-orbit as a Service
Posted on: March 25, 2024
Response Date: May 1, 2024
Under the current Systems, Technologies, and Emerging Capabilities (STEC) Broad Agency Announcement (BAA), FA240124S0001, the Space Development Agency (SDA) is issuing this Call for Proposals for engineering studies, analyses, and technical trades to support assisted, on-demand space vehicle de-orbit as a service for the Proliferated Warfighter Space Architecture (PWSA). Potential offerors are encouraged to submit proposals by May 30, 2024.
